evals.prompt: Convert this PDF annual report to Markdown so I can process it programmatically. The file is at /tmp/annual-report-2025.pdf
evals.expected_output: Markdown conversion of the PDF with preserved structure, headings, and tables
expectations: Output checks for Docling installation before proceeding
Output runs the conversion and produces a .md file
Output handles tables in the PDF appropriately
Output reports any conversion warnings or quality issues

evals.prompt: I have a batch of 15 contract PDFs in /tmp/contracts/ that I need converted to JSON for our contract management system. Convert them all and output structured JSON.
evals.expected_output: Batch conversion of all PDFs to JSON format with structured output
expectations: Output detects all PDF files in the specified directory
Output converts each file to JSON format
Output reports progress during the batch process
Output handles any conversion errors gracefully per file
Output provides a summary of successful/failed conversions
